name: Associated Capital Group, Inc.
business: We are a Delaware corporation, incorporated in 2015, that provides alternative investment management services and operates a direct investment business to invest and control businesses that fit our criteria over time. The business earns management and incentive fees from its advisory activities. We serve a wide variety of investors globally, including private wealth management clients, corporations, corporate pension and profit-sharing plans, foundations and endowments.

exposures.sentence: In merger arbitrage, the goal is to earn absolute positive returns.
We primarily manage assets across a range of risk and event arbitrage portfolios and in equity event-driven value strategies.
The Company is reviewing the launch of new products, including private equity, direct investment and other funds, which leverage and complement our core strengths in fundamental investing.
